headline: Can Visa Stock Compound Its Way Higher?
summary: Visa (V) trades at $365.14 per share on a $660.2B market cap and 29.7x trailing earnings. Under a conservative 3-year scenario, the math points to roughly 42% upside. Revenue compounding does most of the work in our scenario. Here is the picture that the math sits on top of.

headline: Global Payments' Q2 2026 Earnings: What to Expect
summary: Global Payments is poised to announce its second-quarter results soon, and analysts predict a double-digit growth in the company’s bottom-line figure.
